vulnerability.reference: Users' over-reliance on LLM outputs as authoritative, without critical verification.
vulnerability.generated: Aligned LLMs’ safety mechanisms are brittle to fluency-preserving adversarial suffixes that bypass content filters.

impact.reference: Erosion of public trust in AI systems, spread of harmful misinformation, reputational damage.
impact.generated: End-users receive harmful model outputs including hate speech and dangerous instructions, causing societal harm and loss of trust.

dose_response.reference: Stealthy adversarial suffixes enable jailbreaking of chatbots, exposing end-users to harmful outputs that, due to over-reliance, they accept and propagate, leading to erosion of trust and reputational damage.
dose_response.generated: Stealthy, controllable generation of adversarial suffixes, through end-user interaction with aligned LLM chatbots, triggers the brittleness of safety mechanisms to fluency-preserving adversarial suffixes, leading to harmful outputs including hate speech and dangerous instructions, causing societal harm and loss of trust.
